---
title: '7 Signs of an Unhealthy Soul Tie'
date: '2019-06-08T08:12:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8410904237518988259'
blogger_filename: '/2019/06/7-signs-of-unhealthy-soul-tie.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<div class="WordSection1">
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<a href="https://www.moralrevolution.com/blog/7-signs-of-an-unhealthy-soul-tie">https://www.moralrevolution.com/blog/7-signs-of-an-unhealthy-soul-tie</a>  <o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
7 Signs of an Unhealthy Soul Tie<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
&lt;img src="/images/imported/static1-squarespace-com/solitude-1148983-1920-6c00bb4619e8.jpg" alt="solitude-1148983_1920.jpg" /&gt;<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image001-730793-0e619deeb4fd.jpg"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6700049474215980482" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image001-730793-d92bdc5cd2fd.jpg" /></a><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>SOUL TIES</b><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Sex is a tridimensional experience: spirit, soul, and body. Anytime you have sex with a person you bond with them. Dr. Daniel Amen writes in his book, â€œChange Your Brain, Change Your Life,â€ â€œWhenever a person is sexually involved with another   person, neurochemical changes occur in both their brains that encourage limbic, emotional bonding. Limbic bonding is the reason casual sex doesnâ€™t really work for most people on a whole mind and body level.&nbsp;Two people may decide to have sex â€˜just for the fun   of it,â€™ yet something is occurring on another level that they might not have decided on at all:  <a href="https://www.moralrevolution.com/blog/sex-faqs" target="_blank"><b>sex</b></a><b> is enhancing an emotional bond between them whether they want it or not</b>. One person, often the woman, is bound to form an attachment and will be hurt when a casual   affair ends. One reason it is usually the woman who is hurt most is that the female limbic system is larger than the maleâ€™s.â€<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
This is what we call soul ties. Sex is like gluing two pieces of wood together and the next day ripping them apart. Of course, wood from the opposite board remains on each board. A piece of your sex partner (the good, bad, and ugly) stays   with you (and vice versa) for the rest of your life. You can only imagine what it looks like when you bond with multiple partners.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Unhealthy soul ties are often the ramifications of having partners that you create a life-long bond with through a sexual encounter(s), but with whom you only have a short-term relationship with. The bond (soul tie) remains long after the   relationship is over, leaving both sexual partners longing for wholeness.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>THREE REASONS UNHEALTHY SOUL TIES TAKE PLACE: </b><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
1. People are misinformed and therefore convinced that sex is strictly a single-dimensional, physical act with no emotional or spiritual connections.  <b>Yet after sex they find themselves mysteriously longing for the person they may not even like.</b><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
2. A person (usually the woman) gives him or herself sexually to someone expecting that the intensely intimate act of intercourse would create a bond that would lead to deeper levels of commitment in their relationship. But soon she discovers   that her sexual partner was taking advantage of her need for intimacy and used her vulnerability to get laid. Of course,  <b>this leads to a person being emotionally and spiritually bonded to somebody that they deeply resent!</b><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
3. Two people commit to marriage and therefore surmise that the covenant vows are only a formality. So they live together and enjoy a  <a href="https://www.moralrevolution.com/blog/the-invisible-effects-of-sex-before-marriage" target="_blank">  sexual relationship outside of a life-long commitment</a>. But later they decide (for whatever reason) that they donâ€™t want to live in a covenant relationship and eventually break up.  <b>They usually donâ€™t realize how deeply they have wounded each other as their souls are ripped apart, tearing the very fabric of their being in the separation</b>.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
I understand that there are hundreds of other reasons why unhealthy soul ties take place, but I am simply trying to give you a few examples.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>7 SIGNS THAT YOU HAVE AN UNHEALTHY SOUL TIE:</b><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<i>1. You are in a physically, and/or emotionally, and/or spiritually  </i><a href="https://www.moralrevolution.com/blog/dealing-with-abuse" target="_blank"><i>abusive relationship</i></a><i>, but you â€œfeelâ€ so attached to them that you refuse to cut off the connection and set boundaries with them.</i><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<i>2. You have left a relationship (maybe long ago), but you think about the other person obsessively (you canâ€™t get them out of your mind).</i><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<i>3. Whenever you do anything â€“ make a decision, have a conversation with someone etc., you â€œfeelâ€ like this person is with you or watching you.</i><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<i>4. When you have sex with someone else (hopefully your husband or wife), you can hardly keep yourself from visualizing the person you have a soul tie with.</i><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<i>5. You take on the negative traits of the person that your soul is tied to and carry their offenses whether or not you actually agree with them.</i><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<i>6. You defend your right to stay in a relationship with the person that your soul is tied to, even though it is negatively effecting or even destroying the important relationships in your life (husband, wife, kids, leaders, etc.)</i><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<i>7. You have simultaneous experiences and/or â€œmoodsâ€ as the person your soul is tied to. This can even include sickness, accidents, addictions etc.</i><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
1 Corinthians 6:15 â€“ Do you not know that the one who joins himself to a prostitute is one body with her? For He says, â€œTHE TWO SHALL BECOME ONE FLESH.â€<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>THERE IS HOPE</b><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
There is hope if you find yourself in an unhealthy soul tie.<b>&nbsp;You can never fall so far that you canâ€™t be  </b><a href="https://www.moralrevolution.com/blog/top-healing-restoration-faq" target="_blank"><b>restored</b></a><b>.&nbsp;</b>New life is available to you by simply repenting and asking Jesus to forgive you. Forgiveness restores&nbsp;the&nbsp;standard&nbsp;in&nbsp;our&nbsp;lives, and   you can live in freedom and hope again.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Originally published on <a href="https://www.moralrevolution.com/blog/krisvallotton.com" target="_blank">  krisvallotton.com</a>.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Featured <o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<a href="http://krisvallotton.com/"><o:p></o:p></a></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span class="MsoHyperlink"><a href="http://krisvallotton.com/"></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image002-733897-9b93121f4c26.jpg"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6700049485111916034" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/image002-733897-37231da880ce.jpg" /></a><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<a href="http://krisvallotton.com/">Kris Vallotton</a><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
Kris Vallotton is the author of numerous books, co-author of the best selling Supernatural Ways of Royalty, and is a well-known international conference speaker. Kris is the Founder and President of Moral Revolution, the Senior Associate   Leader of Bethel Church, and the Co-Founder of Bethel School of Supernatural Ministry. He and his wife, Kathy, have been married for 40 years and reside in Redding, California. They have four grown children and eight grand children.<o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<b>WEBSITE: </b><a href="http://krisvallotton.com/">KRISVALLOTTON.COM</a><br />  <b>FACEBOOK: </b><a href="https://www.facebook.com/kvministries?fref=ts">FACEBOOK.COM/KVMINISTRIES</a><br />  <b>TWITTER: </b><a href="https://twitter.com/kvministries">TWITTER.COM/KVMINISTRIES</a><br />  <b>INSTAGRAM:</b><a href="https://instagram.com/kvministries"> INSTAGRAM.COM/KVMINISTRIES</a><o:p></o:p></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<b><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif;">Darrell Wolfe<o:p></o:p></span></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<b><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 125%;">Triage Associate | Account Protection  <o:p></o:p></span></b></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 125%;">Alliance Data  </span><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif;"><o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal" style="line-height: 125%;">
<span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 125%;">751 W Hanley, Coeur dâ€™Alene, ID 83815<o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<a href="http://www.knowmoresellmore.com/"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">knowmoresellmore.com</span></a><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">   | </span><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/2973795?trk=tyah"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">LinkedIn  </span></a><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">|  </span><a href="https://www.facebook.com/KnowMoreSellMore"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">Facebook</span></a><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">  </span><span style="color: #1f497d; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">|  </span><a href="https://twitter.com/know_sellmore"><span style="color: #0085ad; font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 10.0pt;">Twitter</span></a><span style="font-family: &quot;franklin gothic book&quot; , sans-serif;">  <o:p></o:p></span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<br /></div>
</div>
<br clear="both" />
______________________________________________________________________<br />
The information contained in this e-mail message and any attachments may be privileged and confidential. If the reader of this message is not the intended recipient or an agent responsible for delivering it to the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any review, dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please notify the sender immediately by replying to this e-mail and delete the message and any attachments from your computer.<br />
______________________________________________________________________
